html:
Exclusive to:  

The Summer Frest is a craftable Dress Item from the Reign of Giants DLC. It requires 1 Rope, 3 Crimson Feathers, and 2 Pig Skins to craft and a Science Machine to prototype. It restores 2 Sanity/min while worn and provides 120 points of protection from Overheating and slight protection from Wetness. A fresh Summer vest lasts 8 days, with a Sewing Kit repairs 62.5% of its durability.

The Summer Frest can sometimes be found in the Chest of the Summer version of the Ice Box Trap set piece.

Contents

  • 1 Downloadable Content
  • 2 Trivia
  • 3 Assets
  • 4 Gallery

Downloadable Content

The Summer Frest is also included in the Shipwrecked DLC, where it is useful to deal with Overheating during the Dry Season. It works exactly as it does in the Reign of Giants DLC.

Trivia

  • The Summer Frest used to be more expensive and require Papyrus instead of Rope to be crafted. It was also much more protective against the heat.

Assets

  • Dropped
  • Equipped

Gallery

  • The Summer Frest as seen in the Hook, Line, and Inker trailer.

Exclusive to:
“Keep off, evil sun!”
–Wilson
“Vests are so in.”
–Willow
“A vest's a vest.”
–Wolfgang
“Everything's a vest.”
–Wendy
“PREVENTS INTERNAL SYSTEMS FROM REACHING HAZARDOUS TEMPERATURES”
–WX-78
“It'll keep me moderately cool.”
–Wickerbottom
“I'm still not convinced plaid isn't all-weather wear.”
–Woodie
“Safety before dapperness.”
–Maxwell
“Quite effective in reflecting thermal waves.”
–Wagstaff
“Ha! The sun is nö warriör if it cannöt penetrate this.”
–Wigfrid
“Safety first!”
–Webber
“Even sun worshipers need a break.”
–Walani
“Well, it should be hard to lose.”
–Warly
“Right back at ye, sunny boy.”
–Woodlegs
“WILBA MUCH SEEN NOW!”
–Wilba
“For the hot times”
–Wormwood
“My sneaking around skills will finally get noticed.”
–Wheeler
“Workplace safety is a top priority.”
–Winona
“It's bright like my personality.”
–Wortox
“Hm... orange.”
–Wurt
“Do I look as cool as I feel?”
–Walter
“I don't know if I want to be so easy to spot...”
–Wanda
The Summer Frest is a craftable Dress Item from the Reign of Giants DLC. It requires 1 Rope, 3 Crimson Feathers, and 2 Pig Skins to craft and a Science Machine to prototype. It restores 2 Sanity/min while worn and provides 120 points of protection from Overheating and slight protection from Wetness. A fresh Summer vest lasts 8 days, with a Sewing Kit repairs 62.5% of its durability.
The Summer Frest can sometimes be found in the Chest of the Summer version of the Ice Box Trap set piece.

1 Downloadable Content
2 Trivia
3 Assets
4 Gallery
Downloadable Content[edit | edit source]
The Summer Frest is also included in the Shipwrecked DLC, where it is useful to deal with Overheating during the Dry Season. It works exactly as it does in the Reign of Giants DLC.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Summer Frest used to be more expensive and require Papyrus instead of Rope to be crafted. It was also much more protective against the heat.

A fresh Summer vest lasts 8 days, with a [[Sewing Kit]] repairs 62.5% of its durability. The Summer Frest can sometimes be found in the [[Chest]] of the Summer version of the [[Set Piece#Icebox Trap|Ice Box Trap]] set piece. =={{Pic32|Gift Icon}} Downloadable Content== The Summer Frest is also included in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC, where it is useful to deal with Overheating during the [[Dry Season]].
